https://www.bohemiarealtygroup.com/our-d.title: The Henry | Bohemia Realty Group
content: Welcome to The Henry, a brand-new, boutique 55-unit luxury rental development on the southern tip of Riverdale. From its perch above Spuyten Duyvil Shorefront Park, The Henry features unobstructed light and air on all four sides and expansive views of the Harlem and Hudson rivers and the New Jersey Palisades. Riverdale’s newest rental development offers residents a unique opportunity to ...

Welcome to The Henry, a brand-new, boutique 55-unit luxury rental development on the southern tip of Riverdale. From its perch above Spuyten Duyvil Shorefront Park, The Henry features unobstructed light and air on all four sides and expansive views of the Harlem and Hudson rivers and the New Jersey Palisades. Riverdale’s newest rental development offers residents a unique opportunity to enjoy resort-style amenities, easy access to diverse restaurants and cafés, and stylish, spacious layouts - all within a quick commute to Manhattan.
